titleStmt.title: SII 18.245: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 245. CHAUḌADĀNAPUR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Muktēs11vara temple.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Mahadēvarāya is dated in Dundubhi, Kārtika śu. Pūrṇimā, Monday. The Śaka year is lost. During the reign of Mahādēva the year Dundubhi coincided with A.D. 1262 and Kārtika śu. Pūrṇimā fell on October 28 Saturday, not on Monday as cited in the record.

The record gives a description of the saint Śivadēva of Muktikshētra and Chīlāḷadēva of Lokki, the disciple of Kāraṇika Siddha Rēvaṇadēva. It further seems to state that Kannādēvi, wife of a certain Kallarasa, made some charities at Muktikshētra in memory of her deceased husband. It also records a gift made by Guttarasa, son of the Gutta chief Vikramāditya. The Mahāprabhu (name lost) of Ulihaḷḷi is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śabdādayōpi gruhyaṁtē
kriyaṁtē vacanādayaḥ Avilaṁghyā hi sarvvēṣāmājñā saṁbhōrggarīyasī . bhāḷēṁdu
kaḷābhūṣitamauḷi śrīkallināthanavanījanamaṁ pāḷisuge saradhi sasi tārāḷi kubhṛddiggaja
ngaḷippaṁnevaraṁ . svasti samastadivijadanujakhacarakhēcaragaṁdharvvakiṁnarakiṁpuru
ṣasida (ddha)munīṁdraphaṇīṁdragaṇēṁdrapramathapracaṁḍapraṇītavividhanruttagītavādyavi
dyāvīṇāvēṇunādavinōda pra(ṁ)saṁnavaradāni mallikārjjunaṁ . kaṁda . sirigiri
yoḷirddu taṁnaya caraṇave śaraṇeṁba vīraśivadēvarigāścariyamenisippa
paścimavaravāhini tuṁgabhadreyaṁ tōṟuttaṁ . Ādēśisidaṁ naḍe nīnā dēśa
kkallimuktanāthanoḷeṁdumumādēvisahitavihenu samādhānadoḷarccisu
vadenalu naḍetaṁdaṁ . Anavarataliṁgasaṅgavananukarisidananyarāśemāḍade
muktēśananapratimaveni(ne) pūjaneyiṁdarccisu va meccisu vavananavaratavu . toThe letter su is written above the line.The letter ra is written below the line.
nevaṁntūkaṁgoḷuvanu yanumānipanaḍigaḍige ś®tigaḷoḷu pugaḷaṁ
nenanenadu mārttigoḷisuva ghanatara śivaliṁgatatvamā śivadēvanu .
paradaivamānamarddana para daivagharaṭṭadiṭṭa paradaivakubhrudvaravajrahataneniThe letter ra is written below the line.
paṁ haragaṇatējaprabhāvadiṁ śivadēvanu . vacana . A(ṁ)ntā sivadēvaru śiva
gaṇājñāsukhadoḷiruttamireyire . kāraṇikareniparoḷu tāṁ kāraṇikane
nipa siddharēvaṇadēvana kāruṁṇyada śiśu bhakyā(ktyā)cārada cīlāḷadēva lkokiyo
ḷesedaṁ . mikka śivabhakti sukhadiṁdukki mahādēvabhāvabharadiṁ jagamaṁ lekke(kki)
sade gaṇasukhadoḷiha lokkiya cīlāḷadēva toṟagale nāḍoḷu . Antiruttaṁmi
rddu . vodavida sivabhaktiya saṁpadamaṁ kallarasanarasi kaṁnādēvige mudadiṁdavitta cī
lōḷadēva jaṁgamasukhaikaguṇasadbhāvaṁ . Ā sati kaṁnādēvi śrīsukhasaṁpadaviḷāRead lā.
savibhavādigaḷaṁ bāsaṇisi sivagaṇaṁgaḷigōsarisade māḍi kūḍi sukhisuttippa
ḷu . vacana . tadanaṁtaravu . karmātiśayadi nijapati dharmmadvajanā dēvalōka vaneyidal
dharmmajñedēvi kaṁhnale karmmariya pāyalujjagaṁgeydaṁnaṁ . paramagurusiddharēThe letter ru is written above the line.
vaṇa sirigiriya nivāsanājñeyiṁ besasidanaca(cca)riya muniya mu
ktēsvaraliṁgadoḷalli tuṁgabhadreya taḍiyoḷū . yi nenanenade sadgu
ru tānēnaṁ tōṟida vicitramenuttuṁ mānini kannā naṁdadi baṁdu
muktanāthana kaṁḍaru . Antā muktikṣētradallirddu ṁgamārcca
natatpareyāgire yire . śivayōgiya ge vīrakaThe letter ta is written above the line.
ṁnādēvi bhuvanavaṟiyalke kalidēvavara va sidaḷu
© svastiśrīmatu yādavarāyanā kra
vartti mahadēvarāya rājya pravarddhamā
mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ vujanipuravarādhīsvara
ḷamārttaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa hannirbbaragaṁḍa ma
jaraṁ vikramādityaputra vīravikramānuja gutta
ṁṇyamaṁ paḍedu liṁgōtsava samayadalli śrīmatu
ktikṣētradalli pratiṣṭeya lli dēvarige sarvva śrīka
ṁ mahāprabhu Ulihaḷḷiya ma gavuḍaniṁ śakavaruṣa
daṁdubhisaṁvatsarada kārttika suda pavurṇnami sōma
pādasamakṣamadalli sarvvanamasyavāgi Ulu
ttarasadēva dhārāpūrvakavāgi
mane 1 tuḍike 1 ṁgaṟa
koṭṭa yere baḍa nalli ga
yalli bellavatta kamatta
ḷu pālisuva
Digital edition of SII 18.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
